name: UBA : Remote access hole in corporate firewall
notes: Detects when there is a remote access hole in the firewall created by GotoMyPC and OpenVPN applications
bb_references: BB:UBA : Gotomypc Process Creation and Openvpn File Creation
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : GoToMyPC and OpenVPN ports, BB:UBA : Gotomypc Process Creation and Openvpn File Creation
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Remote access hole in corporate firewall on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : GoToMyPC and OpenVPN ports, BB:UBA : Gotomypc Process Creation and Openvpn File Creation
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Remote access hole in corporate firewall
